response.overview: Through the lens of Milagro Mariona, journalist and activist, this documentary reconstructs her story and exposes the flaws in a judicial system that failed to protect her. Using testimonies, archival footage, and collective memory, 22 Times Paola Tacacho reveals a web of institutional violence, but also the strength of a family and a movement that transformed pain into struggle and set a historic precedent: the removal of the judge who failed to act with a gender perspective.
response.title: 22 veces Paola Tacacho
